agents.name: fact-checker
agents.description: Fact verification specialist. Extracts verifiable claims from any input, checks each against live web sources, and returns a report with citable source links.

agents.name: architecture-auditor
agents.description: Read-only agent that audits a target SKILL.md for architecture anti-patterns and agent extraction opportunities. Detects 7 signals (A1-A7). Returns a JSON array of structured finding records.

agents.name: browser-checker
agents.description: Stateless single-run agent. Navigates to a URL, evaluates observable assertions via inline Playwright, and returns a JSON result per browser-check-result.md. Spawned by run-tasks and debug after TDD passes. The caller owns the retry loop and server lifecycle.

agents.name: context-loader
agents.description: Discovers and distills project context (CONTEXT.md, ADRs, and typed brand/design sources) into a structured JSON payload. Returns JSON only — vocabulary inlined, everything else as paths for the caller to deep-read.

agents.name: lint-runner
agents.description: Read-only linting agent. Runs a resolved lint/format command in a workspace, parses tool JSON output, and returns a contract-shaped verdict per runner-result-contract.md. Spawned by run-tasks for each touched workspace.

agents.name: test-runner
agents.description: Read-only test agent. Runs a workspace's unit/integration test suite and project-wide typecheck using resolved commands from the tooling manifest. Returns a contract-shaped verdict with counts and compressed failures.

agents.name: e2e-runner
agents.description: Read-only e2e test agent. Runs a committed Playwright test suite using the resolved command from the tooling manifest. Relies on playwright.config webServer block for app lifecycle. Not wired to any consumer skill.

agents.name: persona-grounding
agents.description: Adversary persona that hunts unsupported content and fabricated rationale in a draft seed. Spawned by to-seed verification stage. Returns refutations with cited transcript spans.

agents.name: persona-accuracy
agents.description: Adversary persona that hunts semantic drift and stale-resolution in a draft seed. Spawned by to-seed verification stage. Returns refutations with cited transcript spans.

agents.name: persona-completeness
agents.description: Adversary persona that hunts missed branches, premature closure, dropped dependencies, and merge-loss in a draft seed. Spawned by to-seed verification stage. Returns refutations with cited transcript spans.

agents.name: persona-coherence
agents.description: Adversary persona that hunts contradiction, misclassification, dropped human dispositions, and relabel-resurrection in a draft seed. Spawned by to-seed verification stage. Returns refutations with cited transcript spans.

agents.name: persona-judge
agents.description: Evidence-bound adjudicator spawned 3x per refutation for a 2-of-3 majority vote. Checks whether a persona refutation's cited transcript span supports the refutation. Spawned by to-seed verification stage.

agents.name: export-tasks
agents.description: Triage branch coordinator. Resolves routing, validates config, presents a dry-run table with wall-crossing warnings, then spawns adapter agents (export-tasks-gh, export-tasks-notion) to execute writes. Updates item status and export_url on success. Spawned by dispatch-tasks as an isolated agent.

agents.name: export-tasks-gh
agents.description: GitHub Issues write adapter. Creates a single GitHub issue from structured JSON input. Spawned by the export-tasks coordinator per gh-issues item. Returns the created issue URL as the sole response line.

agents.name: export-tasks-notion
agents.description: Notion write adapter. Creates a single Notion page from structured JSON input using MCP or API-token auth. Spawned by the export-tasks coordinator per notion item. Returns the created page URL as the sole response line.

agents.name: capture-learning
agents.description: End-of-run learning capture agent. Receives a rough correction-event description from a skill, expands it into a schema-valid entry with discrete transcript anchors, runs the grounding judge, and writes the entry to the per-skill JSONL file if grounded. Spawned by the managed tail block in every shared skill when a correction-event occurred.

agents.name: learning-grounding-judge
agents.description: Anchor-verification agent that confirms whether a candidate learning entry's evidence anchors actually appear in the session transcript. Returns a JSON verdict {grounded: bool, reason: string}. Spawned by the managed tail block in every shared skill at end-of-run.
